## Compatibility And Safety

- [ ] I preserved existing `/api/proposals` behavior or described intentional compatibility changes.
- [ ] I preserved `$HERMES_HOME/proposals_trigger` and executor trigger contracts or described an approved migration.
- [ ] I did not add hidden model/provider execution or misleading worker-state claims.
- [ ] I checked authentication, secret handling, and safe rendering implications where relevant.

## Validation

- [ ] `.venv/bin/python -m compileall -q main.py`
- [ ] `.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `docker build -t hermes-proposals-dashboard .` when container behavior changes
- [ ] Rendered UI flow checked when visible pages change
